summary: Comprehensive testing of Dott.ssa Felaco admin article management system. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed including login flows, article CRUD, logout, and protected route access.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns (auth.py, models.py, utils.py, server.py)
MongoDB _id is properly excluded from all article query responses
JWT token expiration is set to 7 days which is reasonable for admin dashboard
Admin seeding on startup is idempotent - updates password if changed
bcrypt hash format is correct ($2b$ prefix)
seed_data_creation: Admin user is seeded on backend startup via server.py on_event('startup')
context_for_next_testing_agent: All admin auth and article CRUD features are working. Backend tests are in /app/backend/tests/test_admin_auth.py. Test credentials are in /app/memory/test_credentials.md. The app uses localStorage for token storage (admin_token key).

backend: Admin login with wrong email (403 Access denied)
frontend: Login with wrong password shows error
Login with wrong email shows 'Access denied'
Login with correct credentials redirects to dashboard
Logout clears token and redirects to login
Accessing /admin/dashboard without token redirects to login
